tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: I'm so close to finishing this assignment, and since nothing else is urgent, I should probably just knock it out quickly.
Phew, I just submitted the assignment right before it closed. Since I'm almost done with everything urgent, maybe I can finally relax and hang out with my friends instead of stressing.

desires: To finally get some real downtime with my friends since the assignment is submitted and I don't want to feel like a work robot.
To avoid looking like I'm slacking off or being unproductive, even though I just procrastinated on the final polish.
To not crash from exhaustion tomorrow since I only slept enough yesterday and have that low-priority note tidying staring at me.

goals.description: Crash into the group chat with cohort_3 and secure a table at the nearest spot so we can eat together immediately; I need to stop feeling like an outsider now that the work is done.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) drives me to prioritize connection above all else once the threat of failure is gone. The avoidant conflict style means I'm rushing this because I'm terrified of the awkward silence if I wait too long or try to do it alone. My impulsive nature makes me want to feel 'real' right now rather than dealing with the looming note tidying later.

goals.description: Eat something substantial with friends and just zone out for an hour; I don't have the energy to think about tomorrow's sleep debt yet.
goals.rationale: Leisure and relationships outweigh my health concerns in my current decision matrix. Even though I know I'll be exhausted tomorrow, avoiding the friction of planning a healthy routine or admitting I'm tired feels safer than actually fixing it. I'll deal with the crash later when the guilt hits.

agent.last_reasoning: Affiliation (0.5) demands immediate connection now that the work threat is gone. Avoidance makes me fear awkward silence if I wait; impulsivity pushes for instant 'realness.' Eating alone feels isolating compared to the group. This secures g1 and g2 while ignoring sleep debt until later guilt hits.

goals.description: Sprint through the final 10% of the assignment and hit submit by 13:25 to avoid looking incompetent to prof_assignment
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) makes me terrified of disappointing prof_assignment, but my impulsive time horizon means I can't afford to overthink perfection; I just need to finish fast enough to save face.

goals.description: Grab a quick bite with cohort_3 immediately after submitting so we don't feel awkward if we're all done at different times
goals.rationale: Relationships are my top priority, but my avoidant conflict style means I'm dreading the potential friction of joining them late or alone, so I'm delaying this until the panic of the deadline passes.

desires: finish this assignment before 13:30 so I don't look incompetent to prof_assignment
get through the last 10% of work without panicking or getting too stressed
not feel like a total failure after today
